patterns: Blind-box runtime currently imports BLIND_BOXES as a Python dict keyed by numeric box id.
Each blind-box entry exposes legacy runtime buckets: name, large, medium, small, hanging.
Input overrides are label-driven from category_info: 大型物品, 中型物品, 散落小型物品, 悬挂物品.
History keys are generated as box:{box_id}:{category_key} and stored under draw_history.json item_pools.
Item state text is applied at formatting time by _format_item when 启用物品状态 is checked.
Existing tests use importlib to load 内容抽取.py and lightweight fake objects for logic-level tests.
dependencies: No new third-party dependencies should be introduced.
Runtime must remain local tkinter and Python stdlib.
New data structures must be consumable without breaking BLIND_BOXES legacy shape.

integration_points.notes: Add pilot five-layer content data and keep or generate legacy four-bucket view.
Keep category_info, input override labels, draw_history item_pools and output behavior stable.
Risky state words include 半透明的 and 带有高光反光的; default blind-box outputs should not relax these risks.
Add data-schema and compatibility tests using the existing importlib + unittest style.
Project rule requires doc sync after implementation tasks.

conflict_areas: blind_boxes.py is large static data; direct full rewrite would be high-review-risk.
Runtime and history are coupled to numeric box ids plus large/medium/small/hanging keys.
Current uncommitted workflow/spec documentation artifacts should not be overwritten.
item_states.py contains risky transparent/reflection wording that conflicts with the new default-output quality gate.
constraints: Planning only; do not execute implementation in this workflow-plan step.
Do not break comma-based input syntax or labels for existing category overrides.
Do not migrate draw_history.json or mix item_pools with animal_pools/expression_pools.
Do not introduce Web, database, service, or third-party UI dependencies.
MVP implementation should stay limited to pilot categories: 桌面+学习, 海底+潜水, 公园+野餐.
blocked_or_risky must not enter default large/medium/small/hanging output.
After implementation, sync agents.md, Game content extraction/CLAUDE.md, README.md and .gitignore.
